query:
UPDATE instances
		SET
			path = ?,
			applied_content_set_id = ?,
			install_stage = ?,
			launcher_feature_version = ?,
			update_channel = ?,
			name = ?,
			icon_path = ?,
			symlink_target = ?,
			modified = ?,
			last_played = ?,
			submitted_time_played = ?,
			recent_time_played = ?
		WHERE id = ?
